bodyText:
What is company secretary services? Company secretarial services — annual ROC filings, board resolutions, share transfers, director appointments, compliance calendar.
Company Secretary Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Pune, Maharashtra since 2012.
Quick Answer: CS Services in Pune — Company secretarial services — annual ROC filings, board resolutions, share transfers, director appo. From ₹5,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Company Secretary Services in Pune
Virtual Auditor provides company secretary services in Pune, Maharashtra. IT and automotive hub of Maharashtra. Our multi-credential practice (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV) ensures comprehensive professional service delivery.
ROC jurisdiction: ROC Pune. Pincode: 411001.

HEADING2: Our Service Scope
• Annual ROC Filing (AOC-4, MGT-7)
• Board Resolution Drafting
• Director Appointment/Resignation (DIR-12)
• Share Transfer & Transmission
• Increase in Authorised Capital
• Registered Office Change
• Name Change (INC-24)
• Winding Up & Strike-Off

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: What is included in annual ROC filing?
faqs.a: AOC-4 (financial statements), MGT-7 (annual return), ADT-1 (auditor appointment). Due within 30-60 days of AGM.
Yes. DIR-12 for appointment/resignation, DIR-3 KYC annual update, DIN deactivation if needed.

faqs.q: What happens if ROC filings are delayed?
faqs.a: Additional fees of ₹100/day per form. Prolonged default can lead to company strike-off and director disqualification.

faqs.q: Do you provide cs services in Pune?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Pune, Maharashtra. IT and automotive hub of Maharashtra. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

faqs.q: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Pune?
faqs.a: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Pune clients.

faqs.q: How do I get started with cs services in Pune?
faqs.a: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Pune businesses with no location surcharges.
